messages.content: can i have 1 short message to my colleague going to leave the company?
"Sad to see you go, but wishing you all the best in your next endeavor. Keep in touch!"
can i have 1 more, creative one
"You will be greatly missed, but the legacy of your hard work and cheerful personality will stay with us forever. Best of luck on your future adventures!"
can i have a decent one
"I'm grateful for the time we've spent working together, and it's been a pleasure knowing and learning from you. Wishing you success and happiness in all your future endeavors."
can i have a short and nice one
"It's been an honor working alongside you, and we'll miss you. Best of luck in your next chapter!"
can i have a short one for someone i not familiar but going to leave company
"Wishing you all the best in your future endeavors. Good luck and take care!"
"It was nice working with you. Best of luck in your next venture!"
"Farewell and good luck in your future endeavors!"
"Sorry to see you go, but we're happy to hear your boss isn't making you walk the plank. Best of luck matey, arrr!"

"Your contributions to this company have been invaluable, and we're sad to see you go. But we know this is just the beginning of a new journey for you, and we can't wait to see what you accomplish next. All the best!"
